modal: must be able to produce or consume
must never generate messages larger than allowed by the receiving SNMPv2 entity
all such implementations must be able to receive the following PDU types
implementations are strongly encouraged to take all possible measures to avoid use of either `commitFailed' or `undoFailed'
all components of a PDU, including those whose values are ignored by the receiving SNMPv2 entity, must have valid ASN.1 syntax and encoding
The strategy of using a different request-id value on a retransmitted request is recommended for use in the majority of situations
are encouraged to support larger values whenever possible
It is mandatory that all SNMPv2 entities acting in an agent role be able to generate the following PDU types
It is mandatory that all SNMPv2 entities acting in a manager role be able to generate the following PDU types
failure to do X will result in Y
